frozenMeter.note: Slice3 zone-oracle iter1。zones/crossPlayer/ownership/playerScopes を別主体(gpt-5-codex clean-room)が oracleText のみから盲予測。Fable はこの不一致集合だけを裁定し zoneClassify は本反復で変更しない(iter2 で compiler 帰属分を修正・iter2 物差しで oracle 帰属分の prompt を改訂)。

summary.headline: substrate=0=ESO 5軸モデル健全。crossPlayer oracleOnly=12(classifierOnly=0)=their/its owner/that player's <zone> 照応 FN を独立物差しが露呈=真クロス率は 0.74% floor の数倍。stack 過剰(cast→stack)=物差し prompt 過剰一般化。battlefield FN=除去/トークンを分類器が取りこぼし。

07a0cba9-8768-4fd9-a3d5-b0f83b4bf8e8.name: Chaos Warp
07a0cba9-8768-4fd9-a3d5-b0f83b4bf8e8.note: 'its owner shuffles it into their library' = owner's library 他者ゾーン。分類器が their 照応の cross を取りこぼし。

08becc07-28bc-4a2f-a6b0-28a2998d2f50.name: Windfall
08becc07-28bc-4a2f-a6b0-28a2998d2f50.note: 'Each player discards their hand' = 各プレイヤーの手札。their 照応 cross FN。

93953926-a644-49bb-9b5a-4c8f19114c7e.name: Demolition Field
93953926-a644-49bb-9b5a-4c8f19114c7e.note: 'that player searches their library' = 他者ライブラリ。cross FN。

ac10d218-f9a6-4058-9cda-a15ca1b0b7b5.name: Assassin's Trophy
ac10d218-f9a6-4058-9cda-a15ca1b0b7b5.note: 'Its controller may search their library' = 他者ライブラリ。cross FN。

d683d985-9888-4d21-8b5f-69e69ce4a03b.name: Path to Exile
d683d985-9888-4d21-8b5f-69e69ce4a03b.note: 'its controller may search their library' = 他者ライブラリ。cross FN。

edd8d1e8-be43-4c38-bb3a-83081fbaf0b5.name: Thoughtseize
edd8d1e8-be43-4c38-bb3a-83081fbaf0b5.note: 'Target player reveals their hand' = 対象プレイヤーの手札。their 照応 cross FN(gold 真値 cross=true)。

9e6a3df4-67a3-452e-a6ef-f04dbadb21ef.name: Living Death
9e6a3df4-67a3-452e-a6ef-f04dbadb21ef.note: 'each player exiles all creature cards from their graveyard' = 各プレイヤーの墓地。cross FN。

bf1341dd-41a3-49f6-87ec-63170dde4324.name: Boseiju, Who Endures
bf1341dd-41a3-49f6-87ec-63170dde4324.note: 'That player shuffles their library' = 他者ライブラリ。cross FN。

d75b9c82-1b49-4c3e-a1b5-aeef57d6644b.name: Cyclonic Rift
d75b9c82-1b49-4c3e-a1b5-aeef57d6644b.note: 'Return all nonland permanents you don't control to their owners' hands' = 他者の手札。cross FN。

14c3ff84-1e82-4606-a433-869fc52cc382.name: Syr Konrad, the Grim
14c3ff84-1e82-4606-a433-869fc52cc382.note: 'put into a graveyard from anywhere' = 他者墓地を含む。cross FN(+library 同伴)。

37108cd4-bbab-4ce3-9ed6-f60e8422e703.name: Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer
37108cd4-bbab-4ce3-9ed6-f60e8422e703.note: 'exile the top card of defending player's library ... cast' = 他者ライブラリ cross FN(battlefield/hand/stack/owner も同伴=複合)。

bcc6eece-75ea-494c-b33a-d4477d504e0b.name: Sink into Stupor // Soporific Springs
bcc6eece-75ea-494c-b33a-d4477d504e0b.note: 'put it on top of its owner's library' = 他者ライブラリ cross FN(+stack 同伴)。

0456ec64-2c81-4763-a352-8ff64a4c3d6b.name: Deadly Rollick
0456ec64-2c81-4763-a352-8ff64a4c3d6b.note: 'Exile target creature' = 戦場の creature を除去=battlefield 参照。分類器は exile のみ拾い battlefield 起点を取りこぼし。

234a734b-ba28-4f1b-9d01-3c3e7d516590.name: An Offer You Can't Refuse
234a734b-ba28-4f1b-9d01-3c3e7d516590.note: 'creates two Treasure tokens' = battlefield へトークン。分類器が token 創出→battlefield を取りこぼし。

5e62b51d-faec-4aa0-9504-cf2c282d08ea.name: Rakdos Charm
5e62b51d-faec-4aa0-9504-cf2c282d08ea.note: 'Destroy target artifact' / 'Each creature deals 1 damage' = battlefield 参照。FN。

7f77a84e-5a4b-4834-aefa-3cecc175ae8e.name: Jace, the Mind Sculptor
7f77a84e-5a4b-4834-aefa-3cecc175ae8e.note: 'Return target creature to its owner's hand' = battlefield の creature。battlefield FN(owner cross は別途未付与=要確認)。

8ddfc283-c9b4-41a5-af88-cf0068e986cc.name: Swan Song
8ddfc283-c9b4-41a5-af88-cf0068e986cc.note: 'its controller creates a 2/2 Bird' = battlefield へトークン。FN。

b1544f21-7e98-461b-aed5-e748b0168c52.name: Swords to Plowshares
b1544f21-7e98-461b-aed5-e748b0168c52.note: 'Exile target creature' = 戦場の creature 除去=battlefield 起点 FN。

ecc435e2-deb1-420a-a79f-01dd08747314.name: Pyroblast
ecc435e2-deb1-420a-a79f-01dd08747314.note: 'destroy target permanent' = battlefield 参照 FN(counter は stack だが battlefield 半が漏れ)。

1b5e6560-ff2e-4475-96cb-63f64c8a86db.name: Soul-Guide Lantern
1b5e6560-ff2e-4475-96cb-63f64c8a86db.note: 'Exile target player's graveyard' の target-player スコープを分類器が別行で取りこぼし(cross は検出済)。

078def07-ae5d-4591-8db6-d156834aab97.name: Etali, Primal Storm
078def07-ae5d-4591-8db6-d156834aab97.note: 'exile ... you may cast' を物差しが stack 参照と判定。ESO 意図では cast は Slice2 イベントでありゾーン軸 stack(明示的スタック操作=counter/return-from-stack)に含めない。物差し過剰一般化。

0fd114c4-092b-4e28-b0dc-ef529f3bc73e.name: Jeska's Will
0fd114c4-092b-4e28-b0dc-ef529f3bc73e.note: 'Exile the top three cards ... you may play them' を stack 判定=cast→stack 過剰。

3aa83ed2-f48b-4ce6-a614-2c54ddf50538.name: The One Ring
3aa83ed2-f48b-4ce6-a614-2c54ddf50538.note: 'can't be countered'(stack 文脈)を stack-zone と判定=過剰。

515c522f-51d5-4f6d-b9b1-ea3c7f6a378e.name: Rousing Refrain
515c522f-51d5-4f6d-b9b1-ea3c7f6a378e.note: exile-then-cast を stack 判定=cast→stack 過剰。

6106ba65-f07b-41ec-8b59-e052bbde5529.name: Court of Locthwain
6106ba65-f07b-41ec-8b59-e052bbde5529.note: 'you may cast' を stack 判定=過剰。

6807167a-e290-4259-940e-3cbbfa75d0a1.name: Stolen Strategy
6807167a-e290-4259-940e-3cbbfa75d0a1.note: exile-opponent-card-then-cast を stack 判定=過剰(cross は別途未付与=要確認)。

6d56aeb1-0a50-46b6-abdb-cd6575a98dc3.name: Praetor's Grasp
6d56aeb1-0a50-46b6-abdb-cd6575a98dc3.note: 'You may play that card' を stack 判定=過剰。

7a3e50a5-c163-4c41-b62d-d52c233c55b7.name: Dire Fleet Daredevil
7a3e50a5-c163-4c41-b62d-d52c233c55b7.note: cast-target-card を stack 判定=過剰。

89ca686a-7c72-4d8f-9290-e89635624a83.name: Cavern of Souls
89ca686a-7c72-4d8f-9290-e89635624a83.note: 'can't be countered' を stack-zone 判定=過剰。

aee82122-d13e-4175-b499-9dde718e4da9.name: Siphon Insight
aee82122-d13e-4175-b499-9dde718e4da9.note: exile-then-cast を stack 判定=過剰。

c02c5547-b9c9-4b2d-9d12-e87bfba8f2d2.name: Herald's Horn
c02c5547-b9c9-4b2d-9d12-e87bfba8f2d2.note: 'cast ... costs less' を stack 判定=過剰。

f8e17f4f-080d-4bba-bd05-ca27e94ccecc.name: Terror of the Peaks
f8e17f4f-080d-4bba-bd05-ca27e94ccecc.note: cast 言及を stack 判定=過剰。

928d977e-cff0-4e0e-83bb-16d73a754f35.name: Gix, Yawgmoth Praetor
928d977e-cff0-4e0e-83bb-16d73a754f35.note: cast/draw を stack 判定=過剰(+hand)。

aa5e9269-b1db-4bf0-a548-24f999f60e44.name: Inevitable Betrayal
aa5e9269-b1db-4bf0-a548-24f999f60e44.note: suspend/cast を stack 判定=過剰(+exile/hand)。

b473e293-59e3-4e04-acf2-622604aeb25f.name: Path of Ancestry
b473e293-59e3-4e04-acf2-622604aeb25f.note: 'to cast' を stack 判定=過剰(scry=library は妥当)。

d4a84e78-d9b9-4c67-8a4b-4329e65f0f15.name: Hullbreaker Horror
d4a84e78-d9b9-4c67-8a4b-4329e65f0f15.note: 'Whenever you cast a spell ... return target spell ... on the stack' は一部 stack 妥当だが cast→stack 過剰が主。

7e8c2a18-e404-40ff-a9e0-ec3eeb6d576e.name: Command Beacon
7e8c2a18-e404-40ff-a9e0-ec3eeb6d576e.note: 'put your commander from the command zone into your hand' に battlefield なし。物差しが battlefield 誤付与。

d04b6c2c-50fc-464d-9991-230efec70d2b.name: Nashi, Moon Sage's Scion
d04b6c2c-50fc-464d-9991-230efec70d2b.note: exile-then-cast の stack 過剰が主(battlefield/hand 同伴・controller boundary)。

2bd111bb-ce02-414c-b5b7-e0e037d8d96b.name: Bolas's Citadel
2bd111bb-ce02-414c-b5b7-e0e037d8d96b.note: 'play from top of library' を stack 判定=cast→stack 過剰(battlefield 同伴)。

0fd57894-b917-41c8-a394-360d1d31b236.name: Ephemerate
0fd57894-b917-41c8-a394-360d1d31b236.note: blink(exile→battlefield)を物差しが hand/stack 誤付与。実際は exile+battlefield。物差し誤り。

38f3b157-0df4-409b-89cc-086e1531cd5b.name: Gray Merchant of Asphodel
38f3b157-0df4-409b-89cc-086e1531cd5b.note: 'each opponent loses life ... You gain life' に control 語なし。物差しが controller を誤付与。

613a8774-165e-4cf6-ad43-124f9ffc9980.name: Nautiloid Ship
613a8774-165e-4cf6-ad43-124f9ffc9980.note: scope each-player: 分類器のみ。'a player'/'each player' 解釈の境界。ESO 裁定保留。

0355249a-8e4e-41db-9cea-1b901faffbe6.name: Witch Enchanter // Witch-Blessed Meadow
0355249a-8e4e-41db-9cea-1b901faffbe6.note: MDFC 土地面の 'your' を分類器が you 付与・オラクルは呪文面のみ解釈。面集約の境界。

6cf50e21-0f60-4e9a-b910-ebe1bad2a29e.name: Blasphemous Edict
6cf50e21-0f60-4e9a-b910-ebe1bad2a29e.note: scope you: 分類器のみ。'each player sacrifices' 主体解釈の境界。

727f3201-1cfc-4ab2-9dfe-be4f7251f42f.name: Boggart Trawler // Boggart Bog
727f3201-1cfc-4ab2-9dfe-be4f7251f42f.note: MDFC 面集約での you 付与の境界。

93723b12-db34-4047-885e-8606415b1553.name: Ashiok, Dream Render
93723b12-db34-4047-885e-8606415b1553.note: 'search their library ... exile ... each opponent' での you 付与の境界(分類器のみ you)。

e744dbb6-2d56-462a-8d49-d79c73944048.name: Portent
e744dbb6-2d56-462a-8d49-d79c73944048.note: 'Look at the top ... target player's library ... shuffle' の主体スコープ境界。

00e0b103-892c-49b3-836d-867fff197bbd.name: Puppeteer Clique
00e0b103-892c-49b3-836d-867fff197bbd.note: 他者墓地から戦場へ出し『you gain control』+『exiled』=owner≠controller の真の境界。ESO で owner/controller 同時保有(both)を裁定要。

4c6a0c30-b547-4eff-8ff4-0ca25803c076.name: Urza's Saga
4c6a0c30-b547-4eff-8ff4-0ca25803c076.note: ownership controller: 'you control' 解釈の境界(物差しのみ controller)。

7aae0a3d-8882-4485-a126-f06ea6593dcb.name: Titania's Command
7aae0a3d-8882-4485-a126-f06ea6593dcb.note: scope controller: 'creatures you control' を物差しが controller スコープ化(ESO では you+ownership controller)。境界裁定要。

cfb23c6b-6e4a-4fc9-b3bb-a3ddc2ba06b8.name: Captain N'ghathrod
cfb23c6b-6e4a-4fc9-b3bb-a3ddc2ba06b8.note: 'a Horror you control' の controller スコープ境界(you-control→scope you か controller か)。

f5bed085-bb7a-4250-9599-b2a8a95e6b6f.name: Lord Skitter, Sewer King
f5bed085-bb7a-4250-9599-b2a8a95e6b6f.note: controller スコープ境界(you control)。

93cf50cf-0ecc-4d3e-abea-778c1ebacec4.name: Massacre Wurm
93cf50cf-0ecc-4d3e-abea-778c1ebacec4.note: you↔controller スコープ swap の境界。

86bf58f2-7f25-4e10-b797-25e0e8e67769.name: Flusterstorm
86bf58f2-7f25-4e10-b797-25e0e8e67769.note: scope you: オラクルのみ(分類器取りこぼし)。'each ... copy ... you may' 解釈境界。

d5be0ff6-39d9-4f9f-a028-e62dc38463f2.name: Gonti, Lord of Luxury
d5be0ff6-39d9-4f9f-a028-e62dc38463f2.note: 分類器 battlefield(enters 正)・オラクル stack(cast 過剰)。両者一部誤の混在。

13cb958f-1e66-4219-901a-ff58275c8475.name: Brainstealer Dragon
13cb958f-1e66-4219-901a-ff58275c8475.note: 対戦相手の手札の呪文を唱える=owner(相手)≠controller(あなた)の真の境界。@both は妥当方向だが ESO 裁定要(+stack 過剰同伴)。

bd7c5a8b-cf62-41e1-a664-b16e3e5d142b.name: Laughing Jasper Flint
bd7c5a8b-cf62-41e1-a664-b16e3e5d142b.note: 他者カードを exile して唱える=owner≠controller の境界。

cae3ec72-436d-4086-9dcb-17b3d92ad5c4.name: Valgavoth, Terror Eater
cae3ec72-436d-4086-9dcb-17b3d92ad5c4.note: 他者カードを唱える=owner≠controller の境界。

f1c2dbe2-fbe0-4058-bdf1-91d1b1832786.name: Dauthi Voidwalker
f1c2dbe2-fbe0-4058-bdf1-91d1b1832786.note: 'an opponent's graveyard ... cast a copy' の owner 検出と stack 過剰の混在。owner 境界裁定要。

fe5690d3-547b-4ce9-8e94-77fdc0e9c5c6.name: Kefka, Dancing Mad
fe5690d3-547b-4ce9-8e94-77fdc0e9c5c6.note: owner 検出 + stack 過剰の混在。境界裁定要。
